holdings.infoBox: BKSE is an equity ETF with a total of 601 individual holdings. The top holdings are Hut 8 stock at 0.53%, D-Wave Quantum at 0.41%, Riot Platforms at 0.40%, StoneX Group at 0.40%, and The Timken Company at 0.39%.

overview.description: The BNY Mellon US Small Cap Core Equity ETF (BKSE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive GBS United States 600 index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of US small-cap companies. The index includes 600 companies, following the first 900 in the Solactive GBS United States 1500 Index. BKSE was launched on Apr 9, 2020 and is issued by BNY Mellon.

data.title: BNY Announces ETF Share Splits
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--BNY Mellon ETF Investment Adviser, LLC today announced that five of their ETFs will undergo forward share splits at a ratio of 3-for-1. A forward share split increases an ET...
